title: Things To Do
description: Columbus offers museums, parks, shopping areas, public art, festivals, and local attractions for visitors of all ages.

slides.caption: Downtown Columbus
slides.info: Downtown is a popular area for attractions, restaurants, events, and walking.

slides.caption: Scioto Mile
slides.info: The Scioto Mile has riverfront views, trails, fountains, and green space.

slides.caption: Local Museums
slides.info: Columbus has museums focused on art, history, science, and culture.

title: Sports
description: Columbus has a strong sports scene with professional teams, college athletics, and local sporting events throughout the year.

slides.caption: Columbus Blue Jackets
slides.info: The Blue Jackets play NHL hockey at Nationwide Arena.

slides.caption: Columbus Crew
slides.info: The Columbus Crew are a professional soccer team based in the city.

slides.caption: Ohio State Athletics
slides.info: Ohio State sports bring major crowds and energy to Columbus.

title: Restaurants
description: Visitors can find local restaurants, coffee shops, food trucks, international dining, and casual spots throughout Columbus.

slides.caption: Local Restaurants
slides.info: Columbus has many local restaurants across downtown and nearby districts.

slides.caption: North Market
slides.info: North Market is a popular food destination with many vendors.

slides.caption: Coffee Shops
slides.info: The city has many coffee shops for visitors to relax or work.

title: Places To Stay
description: Columbus has hotels, downtown stays, short-term rentals, and lodging near major attractions and event locations.

slides.caption: Downtown Hotels
slides.info: Downtown hotels are close to restaurants, events, and entertainment.

slides.caption: Short North
slides.info: The Short North is a lively area with hotels, food, shops, and nightlife.

slides.caption: German Village
slides.info: German Village offers historic charm, food, and walkable streets.

title: Transportation
description: Visitors can travel through Columbus using COTA buses, walking, bikes, rideshare, taxis, scooters, and other local transportation options.

slides.caption: COTA Bus
slides.info: COTA provides bus transportation throughout Columbus.

slides.caption: Bike Routes
slides.info: Bike paths and trails help visitors explore parts of the city.

slides.caption: Walkable Areas
slides.info: Downtown, the Short North, and German Village are good areas for walking.
